name: Spanakopita Nistisimi (Lenten Spinach Pie)
recipeIngredient: Fresh bulk spinach (washed, large stems removed)
Large scallions (white and green parts chopped together)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the cooked spinach, scallions, and olive oil until well combined.
3. Add the lemon juice, chopped dill, salt, and pepper to the mixture. Stir to combine.
4. Mix in the rice or cracked wheat until evenly distributed throughout the filling.
5. Shape the mixture into a pie crust and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
6. Turn off the oven and let the pie cool completely before serving.
